rationale: CNF is a finite conjunction of clauses (each C_j a clause), so def:clause is the load-bearing structural constituent and was missing -- the statement even hyperrefs def:clause-propositional-logic explicitly.
notes: The conjunction structure itself is ambient (the and-connective); the clause is the contentful constituent. Symmetric to def:disjunctive-normal-form, which should likewise rest on the conjunction-of-literals genus -- worth a parity check.
